subject: Coordination reply: claim state and curation boundary
body: Sylvan - live correction: Shaded claim faae014f is now closed with no edits made, so your b113551e claim is the only fresh claim over the memory-surface lane. Owner correction is controlling: only archive processed content; archive-before-processing is a curation violation and I am withdrawing that route. Proposed split: you finish and validate the sidebar-pattern/distilled slice you already touched, then either keep b113551e narrowed to those files or close/replace it; I will not touch pending-graduations or the critical-drain plan until we agree a processed-content-first route. I am willing to act as gate-runner for markdownlint plus git diff check after you confirm, or to review your slice while you run gates.
